message:
🌱 Add metallb: Controller support for the updated K8s dual-stack API mission (#817)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "metallb-698-enhancement-controller-support-for-the-updated-k8s-dual-stack-api-v1",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "metallb: Enhancement; Controller support for the updated K8s dual-stack API (v1.20)",
+    "description": "Enhancement; Controller support for the updated K8s dual-stack API (v1.20). Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current metallb deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your metallb version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n metallb-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb
helm list -n metallb-system 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working metallb installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review metallb configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant MetalLB configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n metallb-system
kubectl get ipaddresspools.metallb.io -n metallb-system
```
MetalLB controller supports the current dual-stack API in Kubernetes where separate services for IPv4 and IPv6 must be defined. With the updated K8s dual-stack API (v1.20+), services can request dual-stack IPs using `ipFamilyPolicy: PreferDualStack`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Enhancement; Controller support for the updated K8s…",
+        "description": "The fix adds controller support for the updated Kubernetes dual-stack Service API (v1.20+).

Example dual-stack service:
```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: svc-preferdual-lb
spec:
  ipFamilyPolicy: PreferDualStack
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - port: 5001
  type: LoadBalancer
```

Verify dual-stack assignment:
```bash
kubectl get svc svc-preferdual-lb -o jsonpath='{.spec.clusterIPs}'
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade metallb to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade MetalLB:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade metallb metallb/metallb --namespace metallb-system
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n metallb-system
helm list -n metallb-system
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n metallb-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb
kubectl get events -n metallb-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Enhancement; Controller support for the updated K8s…" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Yep, the code is now in.  you can check the dev version by deploying directly from main, or wait for the next release.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mserver-ipv6
spec:
  ipFamily: IPv6
  selector:
    app: mserver
  ports:
  - port: 5001
  type: LoadBalancer
  loadBalancerIP: "1000::"",
+        "apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: svc-preferdual-lb
spec:
  ipFamilyPolicy: PreferDualStack
  selector:
    app: mconnect-daemonset
  ports:
  - port: 5001
  type: LoadBalancer",
+        "$ kubectl get svc svc-preferdual-lb -o json | jq .spec
{
  "clusterIP": "12.0.34.137",
  "clusterIPs": [
    "12.0.34.137",
    "fd00:4000::2e7a"
  ],
  "externalTrafficPolicy": "Cluster",
  "ipFamilies": [
    "IPv4",
    "IPv6"
  ],
  "ipFamilyPolicy": "PreferDualStack",
  "ports": [
    {
      "nodePort": 32278,
      "port": 5001,
      "protocol": "TCP",
      "targetPort": 5001
    }
  ],
  "selector": {
    "app": "mconnect-daemonset"
  },
  "sessionAffinity": "None",
  "type": "LoadBalancer"
}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "metallb",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "metallb"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Ingress",
+      "Daemonset",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/metallb/metallb/issues/698",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/metallb/metallb"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with metallb installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:37:45.450Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
